description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push to master branch (excluding tags), on pull requests to master, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has concurrency control, cancelling in-progress runs for non-master refs. It defines two jobs, e2e-tests and rust-tests, both running in a defi/ain-builder:latest container on ubuntu-latest. The e2e-tests job checks out code, populates environment, installs dependencies, sets up user dependencies, uses rust-cache, builds and cleans up, then runs end-to-end tests. The rust-tests job checks out code, populates environment, sets up dependencies, uses rust-cache, builds dependencies and configuration, then runs Rust tests.
